positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a sprawling constellation map, featuring stylized deep space nebulas and geometric celestial bodies. The main subject is a central grouping of eight stylized, glowing stars connected by elegant, thin arc lines, forming a recognizable but fictional constellation. The color palette should use deep indigo, electric cyan, and ethereal gold accents, set against a rich midnight blue background. The style must be flat graphic design, perfect for screen printing on apparel, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Use a balanced, symmetrical composition, with the central star group anchored slightly above the vertical center line. The overall aesthetic should be cosmic, mystical, and clean, like a retro astronomical diagram.
